title: Include VGG-16-BN CIFAR-10 results in paper
description: Data exists in iter_005 for 4 methods (constant, half_lambda, CWD, cosine_schedule). Add to paper as multi-architecture validation. Zero compute cost.

title: Add half_lambda and random_mask to main results table
description: Data exists in iter_003. Random mask vs CWD comparison is one of the most interesting findings but is currently a dangling reference in Section 7.3.
impact: Strengthens weight decay illusion evidence; removes dangling reference

title: Create actual Figure 1 (framework diagram)
description: Replace framework_diagram_desc.md placeholder with a real TikZ or matplotlib diagram showing the phi modulator control loop.
impact: Removes placeholder; paper currently has a broken figure reference

title: Create certified band visualization
description: Generate figure showing [lambda_min(t), lambda_max(t)] with method trajectories overlaid. This IS the paper's core theoretical contribution and has no figure.
impact: Critical -- the central theorem has no visual representation

title: Create subsumption verification table
description: Compute % of epochs where each method's lambda_eff lies within [lambda_min, lambda_max]. Paper claims >=95% without supporting data.

title: Confront V_t increasing in text
description: The Lyapunov certificate guarantees V_{t+1} <= V_t, but V_t empirically increases. This must be discussed honestly. Either the certificate applies only to a decomposition of V_t, or the learning rate exceeds 1/L making the guarantee vacuous.
impact: Prevents referee from dismissing the entire theoretical framework

title: Complete NoBN ablation with all methods
description: Run cosine_schedule, SWD, half_lambda, random_mask, PMP-WD on ResNet-20-NoBN CIFAR-10, 3 seeds each. Test whether removing BN widens the method spread.
impact: Validates or falsifies the BN-narrowing mechanism claim

title: Validate Theorem 2 with cumulative alignment analysis
description: Compute bar_delta and sup_delta from existing instrumented runs (15 data points). Report Spearman correlation against generalization gap. If too few data points, run additional configs from Phase 4.
impact: Either validates or removes a claimed theorem

title: Add CIFAR-100 results table and clarify data provenance
description: Create explicit Table 3 for CIFAR-100. Note that CIFAR-100 data for non-PMP-WD methods comes from iter_003, while PMP-WD comes from iter_006.

title: Discuss SGD-vs-AdamW theory-experiment mismatch
description: Add explicit discussion of the fact that all theorems assume SGD dynamics while experiments use AdamW. Discuss implications for PMP-WD costate approximation.

title: Fix theorem numbering and CIFAR-100 spread inconsistency
description: Renumber theorems sequentially. Standardize CIFAR-100 spread reporting convention.

title: Verify BEM computation for half_lambda
description: Evolution lesson flags BEM=0.000 for half_lambda as mathematically impossible (should be ~0.5). Check computation code for bugs.
impact: May reveal systematic metric computation error

title: Run ImageNet experiments
description: Constant + CWD + PMP-WD on ResNet-50, 90 epochs, 3 seeds. Diagnose prior failures first. Consider ImageNet-100 as fallback.
impact: Transforms paper from workshop-tier to top-tier venue candidate

title: Add Appendix A with Theorem 1 proof
description: Paper references 'Full proof in Appendix A' which does not exist.

title: Reframe PMP-WD honestly
description: Replace 'consistent with optimality' with honest assessment: statistically indistinguishable from all other methods including random mask. Method ordering is not reproducible.

title: Report L (smoothness constant) estimation
description: Document how L is estimated, its values across training, and its impact on certified band width.

title: Test PMP-WD vs random mask directly
description: Run PMP-WD and random mask in the same experiment batch with 5+ seeds to determine if PMP-WD provides any advantage over random binary masking.
impact: Answers whether 'optimal' control outperforms random control
